questionText: Complete a frase com a forma verbal correta: 'The board _____ the merger proposal before the shareholders voted on it.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'The company is heavily dependent _____ its top three clients for revenue.'
Qual é a forma correta do verbo na voz passiva: 'The annual report _____ by the CFO every December.'
Escolha o artigo correto: 'She was appointed _____ CEO of the company last quarter.'
Complete com a conjunção adequada: 'The project was delivered on time _____ the team faced several unexpected setbacks.'
Qual verbo modal completa corretamente a frase: 'You _____ submit the financial disclosure before the deadline or face a penalty.'
Escolha a forma correta do comparativo: 'Our new product line is _____ profitable than we initially projected.'
Complete a frase com a preposição correta: 'The finance team is responsible _____ preparing the quarterly budget.'
Qual a forma verbal correta no Present Perfect: 'The company _____ its market share by 15% this year.'
Escolha a opção gramaticalmente correta para a voz passiva: 'The new policy _____ by the management team yesterday.'
Complete a frase com a preposição correta: 'Investors are concerned _____ the rising inflation rate.'
Qual é a forma correta do verbo modal no passado: 'The auditors said we _____ keep all financial records for at least seven years.'
Escolha o pronome relativo correto: 'The consultant _____ recommendations we followed has an excellent track record.'
Selecione a forma correta do gerúndio ou infinitivo: 'The board agreed _____ the expansion project.'
Complete a frase com a forma verbal correta: 'By the end of next year, the company _____ its debt by half.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'The CEO handed over control _____ the company to the new management.'
Qual é a forma correta do adjetivo: 'The merger resulted in a _____ more efficient supply chain.'
Complete a frase com a estrutura condicional correta: 'If the deal _____ finalized last week, we would be celebrating now.'
Escolha a opção que completa corretamente a oração nominal: '_____ to expand into Asian markets has been a strategic priority for five years.'
Qual forma verbal é gramaticalmente correta: 'The shareholders insisted that the CEO _____ before the audit was completed.'
Complete a frase com a forma correta do verbo: 'Not only _____ the company increased revenue, but it also reduced costs significantly.'
Selecione a estrutura verbal correta: 'The report suggests that the financial crisis _____ the result of poor risk management.'
Escolha a conjunção adequada para ligar as orações: 'The company maintained profitability _____ facing intense competition and rising material costs.'
Qual é a forma correta do particípio passado na voz passiva: 'The contract _____ by the legal team before it was signed by both parties.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'The board is looking forward _____ reviewing the quarterly results next week.'
Qual estrutura gramatical está correta: 'Rarely _____ seen such a dramatic turnaround in a company's financial performance.'
Complete a frase corretamente: 'The financial analyst recommended _____ the portfolio before the market correction.'
Selecione a forma correta da oração reduzida: '_____ with the audit findings, the CFO issued a public statement.'
Qual forma verbal preenche corretamente a lacuna: 'The new tax regulation requires that all businesses _____ their accounts quarterly.'
Complete a frase com a estrutura verbal correta: 'The negotiators _____ for three hours before reaching a preliminary agreement.'
Escolha a opção correta para expressar propósito formal: 'The company restructured its debt _____ avoid bankruptcy and continue operations.'
Qual a preposição correta: 'The firm succeeded _____ securing a major government contract despite fierce competition.'
Selecione a forma verbal adequada: 'Under no circumstances _____ employees discuss confidential financial information outside the company.'
Complete com a opção gramaticalmente correta: 'The economic downturn had a significant impact _____ small and medium-sized enterprises.'
Qual é a estrutura correta com inversão: 'Only after the bankruptcy proceedings were concluded _____ the extent of the fraud.'
Escolha a forma nominal correta: 'The CEO's decision to acquire the startup is being called into question _____ its high valuation.'
Complete com a estrutura de inversão correta: 'No sooner _____ the quarterly results than the stock price began to fall.'
Selecione a forma correta do subjuntivo: 'It is imperative that the board _____ an independent auditor to review the discrepancies.'
Qual forma verbal está correta em contexto de discurso indireto: 'The analyst claimed that the markets _____ by the time the report was published.'
Escolha a opção gramaticalmente correta para a cláusula absoluta: '_____ , the firm proceeded with the hostile takeover bid.'
Complete com a estrutura condicional mista correta: 'If the board _____ the merger in 2019, the company would be in a much stronger position today.'
Qual é a estrutura verbal correta para exprimir crítica formal no passado: 'The executives _____ the risks before launching the product in an untested market.'
Selecione a estrutura com particípio correto: 'The bonds, _____ by the government, are considered the safest investment option available.'
Qual preposição completa corretamente a expressão formal: 'The merger was called off _____ irreconcilable differences between the two management teams.'
Escolha a forma gramaticalmente correta da oração com inversão enfática: 'Such _____ the pressure from investors that the CEO tendered his resignation.'
Complete a frase com a estrutura nominal correta: '_____ the new compliance framework is still a point of contention among senior executives.'
Qual é a forma correta na oração com 'wish' + perfeito: 'The shareholders wish the board _____ more transparent about the financial irregularities.'
Selecione a forma verbal correta com 'would rather' em contexto de pedido formal: 'The client would rather we _____ the contract terms before the end of the fiscal year.'
Escolha a opção correta para a estrutura de clivagem com ênfase: 'It was the unexpected devaluation of the currency _____ triggered the chain of insolvencies.'
Qual estrutura completa corretamente a frase com elipse: 'The CFO disagreed with the proposal, as did _____ of the senior analysts.'
Complete a frase com a forma correta do verbo na voz passiva com modal perfeito: 'The financial projections _____ more carefully before they were presented to the board.'
